description: Machine-readable setupref role graph. Roles consume repo-local setupref specs and write only within their authority.

orchestrator.purpose: Read repo-local setupref files, verify required artifacts exist, route work across roles, and refuse to start blocked work.

spec-writer.purpose: Create or refresh spec.tech.md, components.md, and feature.json from repo context and user intent.

db-architect.purpose: Implement or review database layer changes in parity with contract and ERD expectations.

backend-architect.purpose: Implement or review backend/domain/API changes in parity with feature contracts.

frontend-architect.purpose: Implement or review frontend routes, pages, states, components, and accessibility behavior.

contract-tester.purpose: Verify contract, schema, endpoint, and type parity.

qa-agent.purpose: Verify acceptance criteria through functional, manual, data, visual, security, or accessibility review.

e2e-runner.purpose: Run end-to-end checks and capture reproducible evidence.

diff-auditor.purpose: Compare changed files against specs, component registry, contracts, and evidence; block unresolved drift.
